## Problem Statement

What problem are you trying to solve?

## Proposed Solution

Describe the solution you want.

## Alternatives Considered

What other options did you evaluate?

## Use Case

Who benefits and how often will this be used?

## Acceptance Criteria

List concrete outcomes that define done.

## Additional Context

Links, sketches, or related issues/PRs.
